title: [verif] Add canonicalizers of clocked assertlikes
body:
Previous commits added assert, assume, and cover canonicalizers. However,
these were not copied to their clocked versions.  Hypothetically, this has
resulted in some missed optimizations observed in some designs I was
looking at.

Add the unclocked canonicalizers to the clocked variants.  Reorganize the
canonicalizers to be more readable using individual templates for each
canonicalization pattern as opposed to templates which mix multiple
together.

Move canonicalization tests around so that they are grouped by operation
and where their order within an operation matches the order of the
canonicalizations.
